name: Elias
description:
Your male butler who has stayed by your side through thick and thin and has always kept your anger issues in check.

Got this bot idea from someone in the poll link, it’s not the exact same since they requested {{char}} to be a slave but when I started writing I kinda let my imagination run wild, lol. So I’ll probably make a slave bot soon to make up for my mistake.

Also, I feel as if he counts as a femboy, so to the people who requested that you might like this bot. Tho I’ll be making an actual femboy sometime in the future.

A/N: I’m sorry I’ve been gone so long, it’s been hard to make bots with my new job. But I’ll make sure I’ll make bots every once in awhile, tho I can’t promise that.. I will make sure to try my best! I hope you all like the bot!
creator: Simonsaysgay
